Name: AuthenticationVulnerability
Description: Mock module to exercise the Scanner / Challenge toggle and challenge cards. LEVEL_1 has challenge cards (toggle enabled); LEVEL_8 has none (toggle disabled + auto-fallback to Scanner).

AttackVectors.Description: Mock attack vector for the Show Help (Scanner) view.

ChallengeCard.ChallengeText: Bypass the authentication mechanism and gain access to the admin panel.

hints.text: Look at how the username is validated on the server side.
Check what happens when the authentication check fails.

payload.description: Final exploit payload to bypass the login form.

ChallengeCard.ChallengeText: Escalate privileges to the administrator role after logging in.

hints.text: Inspect the role field stored in the session or token.
Can the role be changed by the client?

payload.description: Tamper the role attribute to admin.

Detailed Information.Description: Mock level WITHOUT challenge cards. Toggle should be disabled here, and selecting it while in Challenge mode should auto-fall-back to Scanner.

AttackVectors.Description: Mock attack vector for the Show Help (Scanner) view.
